visa_types.name: Tourism
visa_types.documents_required:
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4mqBoKkIGFhDZwPZcCJyZC/11e0557a101c5efc5bae05a1d0c4913b/tourism-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[cze > gha > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)
visa_types.processing_time:
VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

New Visa Application Form Czech (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/lmwrTC2U96wBr1FTAsA9o/69d0a53dd4b8f9754959c62851a03674/application_form_Czech.pdf)

Please Note:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Tourist visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Tourist visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for tourism purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia

## Visa Fees

[cze > gha > en > Table:Tourism > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/4mqBoKkIGFhDZwPZcCJyZC/11e0557a101c5efc5bae05a1d0c4913b/tourism-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.

## Photo Specifications
 Photographs must follow the below guidelines
- in colour
- 35x45 mm
- printed on normal photographic paper
- taken against a light background
- full face taken straight forward 30-36 mm from point of the chin to the head of hair
- the person is to be captured with neutral facial expression, with his/her eyes open and mouth closed
- The photograph of a person, who for religious or medical reasons is wearing a head cover, must show the person's cheeks, chin and forehead
- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
 VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

## Download Forms
 Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
New Visa Application Form English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1jcPtRLtUTd9OeHWAK5OW8/46c23efb95ab908c743cf104c0944969/application_form_english.pdf)
New Visa Application Form Czech (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/lmwrTC2U96wBr1FTAsA9o/69d0a53dd4b8f9754959c62851a03674/application_form_Czech.pdf)

Please Note:
- Number of pages: 3
- You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form. 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business
                                                                            purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business
                                                                            purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia

## Visa Fees

[cze > gha > en > Table:Business > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6ukikAcyxdv52cCn4nZql9/7646c9ca3940c4d1fc5ba0ef5ef0f1b2/business-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.

## Photo Specifications
Photographs must follow the below guidelines
- in colour
- 35x45 mm
- printed on normal photographic paper
- taken against a light background
- full face taken straight forward 30-36 mm from point of the chin to the head of hair
- the person is to be captured with neutral facial expression, with his/her eyes open and mouth closed
- The photograph of a person, who for religious or medical reasons is wearing a head cover, must show the person's cheeks, chin and forehead
- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
 VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

## Download Forms
 Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms

New Visa Application Form English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7AKzMgFTLx19d0hxbg1hu3/27cd47845131d95e6cafa28eda3a95be/application_form_english__2_.pdf)

New Visa Application Form Czech (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1JQUnmSkzuCFiRUIBOXyER/572f33279a682082de43773856a986d6/application_form_Czech__1_.pdf) 
Please Note:
- Number of pages: 3
- You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form. 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
A visa for a cultural visit is required if during any portion of your stay you intend to attend one or more cultural events. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A visa for a cultural visit is required if during any portion of your stay you intend to attend one or more cultural events. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia

## Visa Fees

[cze > gha > en > Table:Culture > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6Dcj9egBijgUTR7OZRSequ/15c5cac4bd2bcf0f69bfb856ae2611f9/cultural-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.

## Photo Specifications
 Photographs must follow the below guidelines
- in colour
- 35x45 mm
- printed on normal photographic paper
- taken against a light background
- full face taken straight forward 30-36 mm from point of the chin to the head of hair
- the person is to be captured with neutral facial expression, with his/her eyes open and mouth closed
- The photograph of a person, who for religious or medical reasons is wearing a head cover, must show the person's cheeks, chin and forehead
- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
 VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

## Download Forms
 Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
Visa application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1jcPtRLtUTd9OeHWAK5OW8/46c23efb95ab908c743cf104c0944969/application_form_english.pdf)

Please Note:
- Number of pages: 3
- You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form. 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open

Overview
A sports visit visa is required if you intend to participate in sports competitions. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A sports visit visa is required if you intend to participate in sports competitions. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia

## Visa Fees

[cze > gha > en > Table:Sports > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6OPcColGXluWt8r9LTlmTr/acf72d579ea5db2daa3fb50bfa86d7d4/sports-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.

## Photo Specifications
 Photographs must follow the below guidelines
- in colour
- 35x45 mm
- printed on normal photographic paper
- taken against a light background
- full face taken straight forward 30-36 mm from point of the chin to the head of hair
- the person is to be captured with neutral facial expression, with his/her eyes open and mouth closed
- The photograph of a person, who for religious or medical reasons is wearing a head cover, must show the person's cheeks, chin and forehead
- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
 VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

## Download Forms
 Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
Visa application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1jcPtRLtUTd9OeHWAK5OW8/46c23efb95ab908c743cf104c0944969/application_form_english.pdf)

Visa Application Form (Czech) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1JQUnmSkzuCFiRUIBOXyER/572f33279a682082de43773856a986d6/application_form_Czech__1_.pdf)

Please Note:
- Number of pages: 3
- You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form. 

## To download the Application Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.name: Visa Types
visa_types.overview:
- All about your Visa
- The Embassy of the Czech Republic in Accra serves nationals of Ghana, Burkina Faso, Ivory Coast, Liberia, Sierra Leone and Togo.
- Information regarding visa procedures, requirements and individual applications can ONLY be obtained from the visa officer of the Embassy of the Czech Republic, not from Security Staff or any other third party. Do not employ agents, travel agencies or other middlemen. For any information with the Visa Application process, please contact the VFS Helpline.
Click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/contact-us)
.
Important information - please read
Applications should be submitted in person (also babies and children).
For every document submitted, you must provide the original (to show at the counter) and one copy (to be attached to the visa file).
The documents are to be presented in (or translated to) Czech, English or French.
The documents submitted will not be returned. Only the travel document will be returned.
All applicants must comply fully with the documents required for the category of visa they are applying for. Incomplete applications may lead to an increased risk of being rejected if the requested information is not provided within 5 working days. Alternative documentation other than that which is stated in the Checklists on the website also may not be accepted.
All applicants applying for a visa need to schedule a (prior) appointment to submit their application.
Before applying, please ensure you are very clear on your purpose of visit – do remember VFS Global can assist and help you through the entire visa application process but is not permitted to advise or guide you on choosing a visa category. Since the work of VFS Global is primarily administrative in nature, VFS Global has no say on whether you will be granted a visa and how long it will take to process the application.
You may need a Schengen visa to stay in the Czech-Republic for a period of maximum 90 days in any 180-days period (short stay visa).
When you apply for a Schengen visa you should specify whether you need a single or multiple-entry visa. If such a visa is granted, it allows you to stay up to a maximum of 90 days in any 180 days period.
If you intend to travel in more than one country in the Schengen area, you must apply for a visa at the mission of the Schengen country where you intend to stay longest. If you intend to stay in each Schengen country for the same length of time, you must apply for the visa at the mission of the Schengen country to which you will travel first when entering the Schengen area.
To check which nationalities need a Schengen visa to enter The Czech-Republic and general information, click the below link:https://www.mzv.cz/accra/en/consular_and_visa_information/index.html (https://www.mzv.cz/accra/en/consular_and_visa_information/index.html)
You are strongly advised to submit your application at the latest 4 weeks prior to the date of departure, as the processing of a visa may take up to 15 days upon receiving a
                                                                complete application. In general, an application can be lodged within 6 months before the start of the intended journey. The processing of visa applications usually takes up to 15 days. But it can sometimes take up to 45 days, if more information is needed. For instance, you may need to undergo screening. You cannot apply for a visa more than 6 months before your intended departure.
A short stay Schengen visa does not automatically entitle you to enter the Schengen area. At the border or during other controls you may, for instance, have to provide information on your means
                                                                of support, how long you intend to stay in the Schengen country, and why you are visiting the Schengen country.
It is therefore recommended that you carry with you copies of the documents which you presented when you applied for the visa (for example letters of invitation, travel confirmations, medical
                                                                health insurance, other documents stating the purpose of your stay). This will help to make the border control procedure easier and avoid delays at the border.
If you want to stay in the Czech-Republic for longer than 90 days, you may require an authorization for Long Stay Visa and Long Term Residence Permit). More information can be obtained from below
                                                                link Long-Term Visas and Permits | Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Czech Republic (mzv.cz) (https://www.mzv.cz/jnp/en/information_for_aliens/long_stay_visa/index.html)
The data collected physically (application files), will be forwarded each working day to the Czech Embassy for processing.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Visa procedures for the short stay of Family Members of EU Citizens (up to 90 days)
I. Who is a family member of an EU citizen?
A family member of an EU citizen is a family member of a citizen of any of the EU country or Iceland, Lichtenstein, Norway and Switzerland, who is a:
- spouse,
- parent if it concerns someone who supports an EU citizen under 21 with whom they live in a common household,
- child under 21 or such a child of the spouse of an EU citizen and
- dependent direct relative in an ascending or descending line or such a relative of the spouse of an EU citizen.
A dependent person is understood to be a third-country national supported by a European Union citizen or the spouse thereof who:
- is systematically preparing for a future profession up 26 years of age;
- cannot systematically prepare for a future profession or perform gainful activities due to illness or injury; or
- is not capable of performing systematic gainful activities due to a chronic adverse health condition.
A family member of an EU citizen can also be understood to be a foreign national who can credibly prove that:
- they are a relative of an EU citizen that is not specified above if:
- they lived in a common household with an EU citizen in the country whose citizenship they hold or in the country in which they held long-term or permanent  residence;
- they are supported by an EU citizen; or
- they cannot care for themselves without the personal care provided by an  EU citizen due to a chronic adverse health condition; or
- they are in a permanent relationship with an EU citizen that is comparable to a family relationship and that they share a common household.
The provisions of the Act on Residence of Foreign Nationals (https://www.zakonyprolidi.cz/cs/1999-326/zneni-20190901) pertaining to family members of European Union citizens will be also be applied to a foreign national who is a family member of a citizen of the Czech Republic. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Visa procedures for the short stay of Family Members of EU Citizens (up to 90 days)
I. Who is a family member of an EU citizen?
A family member of an EU citizen is a family member of a citizen of any of the EU country or Iceland, Lichtenstein, Norway and Switzerland, who is a:
- spouse,
- parent if it concerns someone who supports an EU citizen under 21 with whom they live in a common household,
- child under 21 or such a child of the spouse of an EU citizen and
- dependent direct relative in an ascending or descending line or such a relative of the spouse of an EU citizen.
A dependent person is understood to be a third-country national supported by a European Union citizen or the spouse thereof who:
- is systematically preparing for a future profession up 26 years of age;
- cannot systematically prepare for a future profession or perform gainful activities due to illness or injury; or
- is not capable of performing systematic gainful activities due to a chronic adverse health condition.
A family member of an EU citizen can also be understood to be a foreign national who can credibly prove that:
- they are a relative of an EU citizen that is not specified above if:
- they lived in a common household with an EU citizen in the country whose citizenship they hold or in the country in which they held long-term or permanent  residence;
- they are supported by an EU citizen; or
- they cannot care for themselves without the personal care provided by an  EU citizen due to a chronic adverse health condition; or
- they are in a permanent relationship with an EU citizen that is comparable to a family relationship and that they share a common household.
The provisions of the Act on Residence of Foreign Nationals (https://www.zakonyprolidi.cz/cs/1999-326/zneni-20190901) pertaining to family members of European Union citizens will be also be applied to a foreign national who is a family member of a citizen of the Czech Republic. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days
The Embassy of Czech Republic also serving applicants who want to travel to Slovakia

## Visa Fees

[cze > gha > en > Table:Family Member of EU Czech Nationals > Visa Fees 1]

Note: *The visa fee is to be paid in Ghc with VFS + the VFS fee 22 euro
All Visa fee and VFS Service charge will be paid equivalent in Ghana cedis (Ghc)

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/gha/en/cze/travel-insurance)
- A filled in checklist. Click Here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/432NxgUt9mUbCEo659Mj9I/ab4ac4f14d91d43b2a8e5c3b8ec32218/family-member-eu-czech-national-checklist-aug-21.pdf) to download checklist.

## Photo Specifications
 Photographs must follow the below guidelines
- in colour
- 35x45 mm
- printed on normal photographic paper
- taken against a light background
- full face taken straight forward 30-36 mm from point of the chin to the head of hair
- the person is to be captured with neutral facial expression, with his/her eyes open and mouth closed
- The photograph of a person, who for religious or medical reasons is wearing a head cover, must show the person's cheeks, chin and forehead
- children in photographs must be alone, and their faces fully visible and eyes open
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If the presented photos do not follow these requirements your application will be considered incomplete!

## Processing Time
 VISA ISSUANCE PROCEDURE AND TIMELINES
A visa application cannot be submitted earlier than 6 months prior to the beginning of the planned journey and can be submitted by:
- Applicant himself
- For minors by a parent or legal guardian
Standard visa processing time is 15 calendar days from the day of receipt of the application at the Embassy. In case the documents are not submitted as per requirements or due to other factors or justified reasons, the processing time may be extended to 45 days.

## Download Forms
 Applicants, who wish to obtain a Czech visa application form, can download the requisite form here.
Please note the instructions mentioned below while taking the printout. 
Download Visa Applications Forms
Visa application Form (English) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1jcPtRLtUTd9OeHWAK5OW8/46c23efb95ab908c743cf104c0944969/application_form_english.pdf)
Visa Application Form (Czech) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/1JQUnmSkzuCFiRUIBOXyER/572f33279a682082de43773856a986d6/application_form_Czech__1_.pdf)
Please Note:
- Number of pages: 3
- You can also obtain this form from the visa application centre.
It is mandatory to be filled by all applicants along with the application form. 

## To download the Application Form:

- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR

- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
